name: Johanna
description: A Tank who shines against Physical Attackers and can effectively clear groups of minions.
title: Crusader of Zakarum
info: There have been many women who have borne the name Johanna in service of the crusade, and each has given her life to purify her faith. Johanna carries on their legacy as she searches the kingdom of Khanduras for the fallen star.

Johanna.name: Punish
Johanna.description: Step forward dealing 113 (+4% per level) damage and Slowing enemies by 50%, decaying over 2 seconds.

Johanna.name: Condemn
Johanna.description: After 1 second, Johanna pulls nearby enemies toward her, Stunning them for 0.25 seconds and dealing 55 (+4% per level) damage. Deals 200% increased damage to Minions and Mercenaries.

Johanna.name: Shield Glare
Johanna.description: Deal 59 (+4% per level) damage to enemies and Blind them for 1.5 seconds.

Johanna.name: Falling Sword
Johanna.description: Johanna leaps into the air for 2 seconds and she can steer the landing location by moving. While in the air, allies below Johanna are Unstoppable. Upon landing enemies hit take 225 (+4% per level) damage and are Stunned for 0.25 seconds.

Johanna.name: Blessed Shield
Johanna.description: Deal 114 (+4% per level) damage and Stun the first enemy hit for 1.5 seconds. Blessed Shield then bounces to 2 nearby enemies, dealing 57 (+4% per level) damage and Stunning them for 0.75 seconds.

Johanna.name: Iron Skin
Johanna.description: Activate to grant Johanna a Shield that absorbs 810 (+4% per level) damage for 4 seconds. While this Shield is active, Johanna is Unstoppable.

1.name: Zealous Glare
1.description: Shield Glare gains 1 additional charge, and deals 70% more damage.

1.name: Divine Fortress
1.description: Basic Attacks grant 10 Physical Armor for 4 seconds, stacking up to 40.  Gambit: Gain 25% bonus maximum Health. Every death reduces this bonus by 5%.

1.name: Laws of Hope
1.description: Activate to heal 20% of Johanna's max Health over 5 seconds.  Quest: Every 10 Regeneration Globes gathered increases this heal amount by 5% of Johanna's max Health.

4.name: Subdue
4.description: Hitting 2 or more Heroes at the same time with Punish increases the Slow to 70% and the Slow amount does not decay.  Quest: Hit 4 or more Heroes at the same time with Punish.  Reward: Punish always Slows by 70%.

4.name: Eternal Retaliation
4.description: Mark enemies hit by Condemn for 10 seconds. Johanna's next Basic Attack against them removes the mark, lowering the cooldown of Condemn by 1 second, refunding 10 Mana, and killing Minions.

4.name: Hold Your Ground
4.description: Increases Iron Skin's Shield by 40% and its cooldown is reduced by 2 seconds.

7.name: Sins Exposed
7.description: Punish reduces healing received by 35% for 3 seconds. Basic Attacks against them refresh this duration.

7.name: Conviction
7.description: Gain 10% Movement Speed, increased to 20% while Condemn is charging up.

7.name: Steed Charge
7.description: Activate to instantly Mount for 4 seconds, unhindered by damage.  Passive: Increase the duration of Iron Skin by 2 second.

10.name: Falling Sword
10.description: Johanna leaps into the air for 2 seconds and she can steer the landing location by moving. While in the air, allies below Johanna are Unstoppable. Upon landing enemies hit take 225 (+4% per level) damage and are Stunned for 0.25 seconds.

10.name: Blessed Shield
10.description: Deal 114 (+4% per level) damage and Stun the first enemy hit for 1.5 seconds. Blessed Shield then bounces to 2 nearby enemies, dealing 57 (+4% per level) damage and Stunning them for 0.75 seconds.

13.name: Roar
13.description: Increase Punish's damage by 50%. This bonus is increased to 150% whenever Punish hits 2 or more Heroes.

13.name: Holy Fury
13.description: Deal 15 (+4% per level) damage per second to nearby enemies. Each Hero hit by Condemn increases this damage by 40% for 5 seconds.

13.name: Blessed Hammer
13.description: Activate to create 2 hammers that spiral outward from Johanna, dealing 65 (+4% per level) damage to enemies hit. Damaging enemies with Basic Abilities reduce the cooldown of this Ability by 2.5 seconds.  Passive: Every 3rd Basic Attack against enemy Heroes releases a hammer.

16.name: Shrinking Vacuum
16.description: Condemn reduces enemy Heroes damage by 30% and Slows by 30% for 3 seconds.

16.name: Holy Renewal
16.description: Hitting enemy Heroes with Shield Glare reduce its cooldown by 1 second and heals for 5% of Johanna's maximum Health.

16.name: Blessed Momentum
16.description: Basic Attacks grant 10% increased Attack Speed for 4 seconds, stacking up to 40%. They also reduce Johanna's Basic Ability cooldowns by 0.5 seconds.

20.name: Heaven's Fury
20.description: Falling Sword rains down holy bolts, dealing 50 (+4% per level) damage to enemies, healing allied Heroes for 68 (+4% per level), and reducing its cooldown by 1 second for each Hero hit.

20.name: Radiating Faith
20.description: Increase the number of enemies hit by Blessed Shield by 2. Its Stun duration is increased to 1.75 seconds and all targets hit are Stunned for the maximum duration.

20.name: Indestructible
20.description: Upon taking fatal damage, Johanna gains a Shield equal to her maximum Health for 4 seconds. This effect has a 120 second cooldown.

20.name: Blinded By The Light
20.description: Activate to grant nearby allied Heroes a Shield equal to 25% of their maximum Health for 3 seconds.  Hitting Heroes with Shield Glare reduces the cooldown of this Ability by 8 seconds.

tooltipMarkup.CrusaderBlessedShield: Deal <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,CrusaderBlessedShieldDamage,Amount"/></c> damage and Stun the first enemy hit for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,CrusaderBlessedShieldStun,Duration" player="0" precision="2"/></c> seconds. Blessed Shield then bounces to <c val="#TooltipNumbers">2</c> nearby enemies, dealing <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,CrusaderBlessedShieldBounce1Damage,Amount"/></c> damage and Stunning them for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,CrusaderBlessedShieldBounceStun,Duration" player="0" precision="2"/></c> seconds.
tooltipMarkup.CrusaderBlessedShieldRadiatingFaithTalen: Increase the number of enemies hit by Blessed Shield by <c val="#TooltipNumbers">2</c>. Its Stun duration is increased to <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,CrusaderBlessedShieldStun,Duration+Talent,CrusaderMasteryBlessedShieldRadiatingFaith,AbilityModificationArray[0].Modifications[1].Value"Precision="2"Player="0"/></c> seconds and all targets hit are Stunned for the maximum duration.
tooltipMarkup.CrusaderBlindedByTheLight: Activate to grant nearby allied Heroes a Shield equal to <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*Behavior,CrusaderBlindedByTheLightShield,DamageResponse.ModifyLimitVitalMaxFractionArray[Life]"/>%</c> of their maximum Health for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,CrusaderBlindedByTheLightShield,Duration"/></c> seconds.<n/><n/>Hitting Heroes with Shield Glare reduces the cooldown of this Ability by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-Effect,CrusaderBlindedByTheLightModifyPlayer,Cost.Cooldown.TimeUse"/></c> seconds.
tooltipMarkup.CrusaderCondemn: After <c val="#TooltipNumbers">1</c> second, Johanna pulls nearby enemies toward her, Stunning them for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,CrusaderCondemnPostPullStun,Duration" player="0" precision="2"/></c> seconds and dealing <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,CrusaderCondemnDamage,Amount"/></c> damage. Deals <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,CrusaderCondemnDamage,MultiplicativeModifierArray[CondemnPvE].Modifier*100"/>%</c> increased damage to Minions and Mercenaries.
tooltipMarkup.CrusaderCondemnBlessedHammerTalent: Activate to create <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,CrusaderBlessedHammerCreateUnitPersistent,PeriodCount"/></c> hammers that spiral outward from Johanna, dealing <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,CrusaderBlessedHammerDamage,Amount"/></c> damage to enemies hit. Damaging enemies with Basic Abilities reduce the cooldown of this Ability by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-Effect,CrusaderShieldGlareBlessedHammerTalentModifyPlayerCooldown,Cost.Cooldown.TimeUse" precision="1"/></c> seconds.<n/><n/><c val="#AbilityPassive">Passive:</c> Every <c val="#TooltipNumbers">3rd</c> Basic Attack against enemy Heroes releases a hammer.
tooltipMarkup.CrusaderCondemnConvictionTalent: Gain <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*Behavior,CrusaderCondemnConvictionBaseMovementSpeed,Modification.UnifiedMoveSpeedFactor"/>%</c> Movement Speed, increased to <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*Behavior,CrusaderCondemnConvictionBonusMovementSpeed,Modification.UnifiedMoveSpeedFactor" precision="2"/>%</c> while Condemn is charging up.
tooltipMarkup.CrusaderCondemnShrinkingVacuumTalent: Condemn reduces enemy Heroes damage by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-100*Behavior,CrusaderCondemnShrinkingVacuumTalentDamageReduction,Modification.DamageDealtFraction"/>%</c> and Slows by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-100*Behavior,CrusaderCondemnShrinkingVacuumTalentSlow,Modification.UnifiedMoveSpeedFactor"/>%</c> for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,CrusaderCondemnShrinkingVacuumTalentDamageReduction,Duration"Precision="2"/></c> seconds.
tooltipMarkup.CrusaderEternalRetaliationTalent: Mark enemies hit by Condemn for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,CrusaderCondemnEternalRetaliationTalentMarkedBehavior,Duration"/></c> seconds. Johanna's next Basic Attack against them removes the mark, lowering the cooldown of Condemn by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,CrusaderCondemnEternalRetaliationModifyCooldown,Cost[0].CooldownTimeUse*(-1)" precision="2"/></c> second, refunding <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,CrusaderCondemnEternalRetaliationCreateManaHealer,RechargeVitalRate"precision="2"/></c> Mana, and killing Minions.
tooltipMarkup.CrusaderFallingSword: Johanna leaps into the air for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,CrusaderFallingSword,Duration" player="0"/></c> seconds and she can steer the landing location by moving. While in the air, allies below Johanna are Unstoppable. Upon landing enemies hit take <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,CrusaderFallingSwordDamage,Amount"/></c> damage and are Stunned for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,CrusaderFallingSwordKnockup,Duration"Precision="2"/></c> seconds.
tooltipMarkup.CrusaderFallingSwordHeavensFuryTalent: Falling Sword rains down holy bolts, dealing <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,CrusaderFallingSwordHeavensFuryDamage,Amount"/></c> damage to enemies, healing allied Heroes for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,CrusaderFallingSwordHeavensFuryCreateHealer,RechargeVitalRate"/></c>, and reducing its cooldown by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-Effect,CrusaderFallingSwordHeavensFuryCooldownReduction,Cost[0].CooldownTimeUse"/></c> second for each Hero hit.
tooltipMarkup.CrusaderHolyFury: Deal <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,CrusaderHolyFuryDamage,Amount"/></c> damage per second to nearby enemies. Each Hero hit by Condemn increases this damage by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*Accumulator,CrusaderHolyFuryDamageAccumulator,Scale"/>%</c> for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,CrusaderHolyFuryDuration,Duration"/></c> seconds.
tooltipMarkup.CrusaderIndestructableTalent: Upon taking fatal damage, Johanna gains a Shield equal to her maximum Health for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,CrusaderIndestructibleShield,Duration" player="0"/></c> seconds. This effect has a <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Abil,CrusaderIndestructible,Cost[0].Cooldown.TimeUse" player="0"/></c> second cooldown.
tooltipMarkup.CrusaderIronSkin: Activate to grant Johanna a Shield that absorbs <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,CrusaderIronSkin,DamageResponse.ModifyLimit"/></c> damage for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,CrusaderIronSkin,Duration" player="0"/></c> seconds. While this Shield is active, Johanna is Unstoppable.
tooltipMarkup.CrusaderIronSkinHoldYourGroundTalent: Increases Iron Skin's Shield by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*(Behavior,CrusaderIronSkinHoldYourGroundImproved,DamageResponse.ModifyLimit-Behavior,CrusaderIronSkin,DamageResponse.ModifyLimit)/Behavior,CrusaderIronSkin,DamageResponse.ModifyLimit"player="0"/>%</c> and its cooldown is reduced by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-Talent,CrusaderMasteryIronSkinHoldYourGround,AbilityModificationArray[0].Modifications[0].Value"/></c> seconds.
tooltipMarkup.CrusaderIronSkinSteedCharge: Activate to instantly Mount for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,CrusaderSteedChargeTimedBehavior,Duration"/></c> seconds, unhindered by damage.<n/><n/><c val="#AbilityPassive">Passive:</c> Increase the duration of Iron Skin by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Talent,CrusaderIronSkinSteedCharge,AbilityModificationArray[0].Modifications[0].Value"/></c> second.
tooltipMarkup.CrusaderLawsOfHope: Activate to heal % of Johanna's max Health over seconds.Quest: Every 10 Regeneration Globes gathered increases this heal amount by % of Johanna's max Health.
tooltipMarkup.CrusaderPassiveDivineFortress: Basic Attacks grant Physical Armor for seconds, stacking up to .Gambit: Gain % bonus maximum Health. Every death reduces this bonus by %.
tooltipMarkup.CrusaderPunish: Step forward dealing <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,CrusaderPunishDamage,Amount"/></c> damage and Slowing enemies by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-Behavior,CrusaderPunishSlow,Modification.UnifiedMoveSpeedFactor*100"/>%</c>, decaying over <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,CrusaderPunishSlow,Duration" precision="2"/></c> seconds.
tooltipMarkup.CrusaderPunishSinsExposedTalent: Punish reduces healing received by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-100*Behavior,CrusaderPunishSinsExposedHealingReductionBehavior,Modification.HealTakenAdditiveMultiplier[0]"/>%</c> for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,CrusaderPunishSinsExposedHealingReductionBehavior,Duration"precision ="2"/></c> seconds. Basic Attacks against them refresh this duration.
tooltipMarkup.CrusaderRoarTalent: Increase Punish's damage by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*Effect,CrusaderPunishDamage,MultiplicativeModifierArray[PunishBase].Modifier"/>%</c>. This bonus is increased to <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*Effect,CrusaderPunishDamage,MultiplicativeModifierArray[PunishProc].Modifier+(100*Effect,CrusaderPunishDamage,MultiplicativeModifierArray[PunishBase].Modifier)"/>%</c> whenever Punish hits <c val="#TooltipNumbers">2</c> or more Heroes.
tooltipMarkup.CrusaderShieldGlare: Deal <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,CrusaderShieldGlareDamage,Amount"/></c> damage to enemies and Blind them for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,ShieldGlare,Duration" player="0" precision="1"/></c> seconds.
tooltipMarkup.CrusaderShieldGlareHolyRenewalTalent: Hitting enemy Heroes with Shield Glare reduce its cooldown by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-Effect,CrusaderShieldGlareHolyRenewalModifyCooldown,Cost[0].ChargeTimeUse"Player="0"Precision="2"/></c> second and heals for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*Effect,CrusaderShieldGlareHolyRenewalCreateHealer,RechargeVitalFraction"/>%</c> of Johanna's maximum Health.
tooltipMarkup.CrusaderSubdueTalent: Hitting or more Heroes at the same time with Punish increases the Slow to % and the Slow amount does not decay.Quest: Hit or more Heroes at the same time with Punish.Reward: Punish always Slows by %.
tooltipMarkup.CrusaderZealousGlare: Shield Glare gains <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Talent,CrusaderZealousGlare,AbilityModificationArray[0].Modifications[0].Value"precision="2"/></c> additional charge, and deals <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*Effect,CrusaderShieldGlareDamage,MultiplicativeModifierArray[ZealousGlare].Modifier"/>%</c> more damage.
tooltipMarkup.JohannaBlessedMomentum: Basic Attacks grant <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*Behavior,CrusaderBlessedMomentumAttackSpeedBehavior,Modification.AdditiveAttackSpeedFactor"/>%</c> increased Attack Speed for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,CrusaderBlessedMomentumAttackSpeedBehavior,Duration"/></c> seconds, stacking up to <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*Behavior,CrusaderBlessedMomentumAttackSpeedBehavior,Modification.AdditiveAttackSpeedFactor*Behavior,CrusaderBlessedMomentumAttackSpeedBehavior,MaxStackCount"/>%</c>. They also reduce Johanna's Basic Ability cooldowns by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,CrusaderHeroWeaponBlessedMomentumTalentModifyCooldowns,Cost[0].CooldownTimeUse*(-1)" precision="2"/></c> seconds.
